title: HIV ALLIANCE INJECTION SUPPLY DELIVERY PROGRAM - 211info
text: TRANSPONDER HIV ALLIANCE INJECTION SUPPLY DELIVERY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a no contact delivery service for hormone injection supplies. 440 Maxwell Road Eugene, OR 97404 Eligibility: Low income individuals or those with transportation issues Hours: By appointment only Email (541) 321-0872 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 321-0872 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Complete the online intake form by Monday at 5pm for Wednesday delivery FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Eugene and Springfield TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the third floor, across from the elevator and at the top of the stairs. Services: Transgender Hormone Therapy Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD FOR LANE COUNTY FOOD PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - RESOURCE NAVIGATOR SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - EVENTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TRANSPONDER
